Text:
Artificial Intelligence is transforming the global economy and job market. 
Experts at the latest technology summit discussed how generative AI models, 
like large language models, are being integrated into creative industries. 
While some workers fear job replacement, others see AI as a powerful tool 
that enhances human productivity and innovation in the digital era.
